summary: Comprehensive testing of Iteration 6 features completed. All features working correctly: Blog section with 5 articles (1 featured + 4 grid), Calendly modal integration, mobile full-screen overlay menu, admin dashboard with 'Invia Report' button, lazy loading on images, code splitting with React.lazy, SEO dynamic meta tags via react-helmet-async, sitemap includes blog URLs.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero showing Mauro Ferrante, 13 countries counter, shimmer effect on Ferrante text
Hero 'Book a Free Consultation' button opens Calendly modal with iframe (calendly.com/mauro-29/business-meeting)
Calendly modal has dark theme styling and close button works
Mobile menu (390px width) opens as full-screen overlay (fixed inset-0 top-[60px])
Mobile menu has accordion dropdowns for Services and Who Trusts Me
/blog page loads showing 5 articles - 1 featured (large) + 4 grid cards
/blog/project-management-agile-vs-waterfall loads with article content (5 h2, 1 h3, 5 p, 1 ul with 4 li)
/blog/real-estate-investment-dubai-2026 loads properly with Real Estate category tag
Blog articles have proper HTML content rendered via dangerouslySetInnerHTML
Blog posts have tags, related articles section, back to blog link
Footer has Blog link in navigation section
Footer has Case Studies link
Footer CTA button opens Calendly modal
Admin dashboard at /admin/analytics has login form
Admin login works with password 4bund4nc142026!
Admin dashboard shows stats overview (Visite Oggi, Conversioni Oggi, Tasso Conv., Visite Mese)
Admin dashboard has daily chart (14 days), top pages, event breakdown, recent contacts
Admin dashboard has 'Invia Report' button that sends weekly report
All images have loading='lazy' attribute (10 of 14 images on homepage)
Sitemap at /sitemap.xml includes all 5 blog post URLs
Each page has unique title via react-helmet-async (verified 6 different pages)
SEO meta tags present: description, canonical, og:title, og:description, og:type, twitter:card
POST /api/track endpoint works for page_view, cta_click, form_submit, whatsapp_click events
POST /api/admin/login works with correct password, returns token
GET /api/admin/stats returns complete analytics data structure
POST /api/admin/send-report works with valid token
seed_data_creation: TEST_User contact created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 fully tested. Key features: Blog section with 5 articles in blogPosts.js (agile-vs-waterfall, digital-marketing-roi, real-estate-dubai-2026, change-management, brand-strategy). Calendly modal uses iframe with URL calendly.com/mauro-29/business-meeting. Admin password: 4bund4nc142026! (token is SHA256 hash). Mobile menu is full-screen overlay with accordion dropdowns. All pages use react-helmet-async for dynamic SEO. GA4 has placeholder ID G-XXXXXXXXXX. Contact form sends real email via SMTP.
